trades.reasoning: Top-tier score of 95 with RSI 66.9 in the ideal bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, and rising histogram — all three momentum signals aligned with room before overbought territory.
Score 95 with RSI 69.0 just below overbought, MACD bullish crossover and rising histogram — strong commodity-sector momentum in a neutral tape where sector rotation is favoring cyclicals.
Score 95 with RSI 69.4, full MACD bullish alignment, and price well above SMA-20 — underappreciated telecom name with low per-share price enabling clean position sizing.
Score 90 with RSI 64.6, MACD bullish, and price above SMA-20 — AI semiconductor leader with durable structural tailwinds and momentum not yet in overbought territory.

decisions.briefing: Markets are grinding modestly higher in a neutral session — NASDAQ up 0.7% and S&P 500 up 0.4% — with no major macro catalyst pushing direction either way. With four open slots and over $1,200 in cash, this is an ideal moment to deploy into the three score-95 candidates (AAOI, HCC, NOK) plus NVDA as a high-quality score-90 name, all of which show clean momentum signals not yet in overbought territory. Existing positions are held; no stop-loss levels appear breached.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on June 1 as investors digested the end of a volatile May marked by tariff uncertainty and mixed economic data. The NASDAQ outpaced the broader S&P 500, reflecting continued rotation into technology and growth names as AI infrastructure spending narratives remain intact. With no major Fed speakers or economic releases today, volume was light and the session reflected consolidation rather than a decisive directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股6月1日小幅走高，投資人消化了5月份因關稅不確定性及參差不齊的經濟數據所帶來的波動。納斯達克漲幅超越標普500，反映市場持續輪動至科技及成長股，原因在於AI基礎建設投資的敘事依然穩固。今日無重大聯儲官員發言或經濟數據公布，成交量清淡，整體走勢顯示市場進入整固而非明確趨勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price and indicator trends, betting that assets moving up will continue to do so for a period. Today's top picks (AAOI, HCC, NOK) all scored 95 because their RSI sits in the 'sweet spot' (55–70), MACD is bullish, and price is above its 20-day average — three overlapping signals of healthy upward momentum. The key risk is that momentum can reverse quickly, which is why the portfolio's 7% stop-loss rule acts as a safety net.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是一種策略，專門買入近期價格及技術指標表現強勢的股票，押注上漲趨勢將持續一段時間。今日精選標的（AAOI、HCC、NOK）均獲95分，原因在於其RSI處於「甜蜜區」（55至70），MACD呈看漲態勢，且股價高於20日均線——三項指標同步確認健康的上升動能。主要風險在於動能可能迅速逆轉，這也是為何投資組合設有7%止損規則作為安全網。
